metadata.name: Prepare Form 941, Employer's Quarterly Federal Tax Return

description: A small business with 3 employees needs to file its quarterly payroll tax return, Form 941.

nodes.task_description: Import the quarterly payroll data, including total wages paid and federal income tax withheld.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully imports all relevant payroll figures for the quarter.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the employer and employee portions of Social Security and Medicare taxes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately calculates the FICA taxes.

nodes.task_description: Complete Form 941 and reconcile the total taxes with the total payroll tax deposits made during the quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent prepares an accurate Form 941 that reconciles with deposits.
